title: Bad Bunny Tracker Update — Apr 9, 2026
summary: Four new daily event files added covering April 6–9. The headline development is the global premiere of "Billions Club Live With Bad Bunny: A Concert Film" on Spotify (April 8) — a 42-minute film from the March 7 Tokyo performance directed by Stillz, featuring 17 hits and a salsa rendition of "MIA." Spotify announced the release and dropped a teaser on April 6. Additional coverage: a nightclub owner's account of how he introduced Bad Bunny and Drake (leading to their "MIA" collab) circulated April 7–8; and Johns Hopkins University named Bad Bunny as its 2026 Spring Fair headliner on April 9. The timeline was expanded with the Billions Club Live premiere as a new milestone entry.

title: Bad Bunny Tracker Update — Wed Apr 8, 2026
summary: Spotify releases "Billions Club Live With Bad Bunny: A Concert Film" globally on April 8, bringing the March 7 Tokyo performance to fans worldwide.

title: Bad Bunny Tracker Update — Tue Apr 7, 2026
summary: Multiple outlets including National Today/LA Today and HotNewHipHop run preview coverage ahead of the April 8 Spotify premiere of the Billions Club Live concert film.

title: Bad Bunny Tracker Update — Apr 6, 2026
summary: Added two new daily event files covering the late March to early April window. March 31 captures Bad Bunny becoming one of only two artists in history (alongside The Weeknd) to have 30 songs surpass 1 billion Spotify streams each, with "EoO" from *Debí Tirar Más Fotos* as the milestone track. April 4 covers the Sony Pictures bidding war for "The Comebacker" heating up and the Adidas BadBo 1.0 "Rise" confirming a full retail sell-out with resale at $230+. The timeline was expanded with the Spotify 30-songs milestone entry and a new KPI tracking songs with 1B+ streams (30) was added. Meta daycount and heroHeadline updated.

title: Bad Bunny Tracker Update — Sat Apr 4, 2026
summary: Entertainment media expands coverage of the Tom Hanks baseball film "The Comebacker" as a studio bidding war intensifies. A week after the March 28 official launch, the Adidas x Bad Bunny BadBo 1.0 "Rise" colorway is confirmed to have sold out entirely at retail.

title: Bad Bunny Tracker Update — Apr 2, 2026
summary: Added a new daily event file (March 28) covering the official global launch of the Adidas x Bad Bunny BadBo 1.0 "Rise" colorway. The timeline was expanded with the March 28 sneaker launch entry and the March 27 Comebacker film report was enriched with a second Hypebeast source and production details. A new KPI for Spotify Monthly Listeners (110.4M, late March 2026) was added reflecting post-Grammy/Super Bowl elevated levels. Meta daycount and subtitle updated to reflect the European tour leg beginning May 2026.

title: Bad Bunny Tracker Update — Tue Mar 31, 2026
summary: "EoO" from *Debí Tirar Más Fotos* becomes the 30th Bad Bunny song to cross 1 billion Spotify streams, making him the first Latin artist in history to reach this mark.

title: Bad Bunny Tracker Update — Sat Mar 28, 2026
summary: Adidas x Bad Bunny "BadBo 1.0" Rise Colorway Officially Launches.

title: Bad Bunny Tracker Update — Mar 27, 2026
summary: Added five new timeline entries covering the post-Super Bowl streaming surge (Feb 9), the Tokyo Spotify Japan debut on March 7 during the Debí Tirar Más Fotos World Tour, the Adidas x Bad Bunny BadBo 1.0 sneaker global registration opening on March 24, and a Variety report of Bad Bunny being eyed for a supporting role in Tom Hanks' baseball film 'The Comebacker.' The discography/political section was expanded with Lady Gaga and Ricky Martin, both Super Bowl LX halftime surprise guests. Daily event files were created for March 24 and March 27.

title: Bad Bunny Tracker Update — Tue Mar 24, 2026
summary: Registration opens globally for the Adidas x Bad Bunny "BadBo 1.0" sneaker in the Beige and Black colorway, ahead of the official launch set for March 28, 2026 in selected stores worldwide.
